results.route_decision: Complex fabric (Smooth, lustrous knit fabric with a satin-like sheen for the body and sleeves. The collar, cuffs, and hem are made of a matte, ribbed knit.) — Gemini Pro best at material physics
issues: SR monogram is misplaced on the front of the garment — spec restricts the SR monogram to the back-neck only.
Large rose/cloud graphic appears on the mid-back, which is a prohibited hallucination — back-center must be empty.
Front-chest rose logo is not rendered as a tonal black-on-black emboss; it reads as visible embroidery/applique with non-tonal contrast, violating the embossed-only technique spec.
SR monogram lettering is distorted and does not cleanly read 'SR' (reads closer to '$R'), failing the canonical gold lettermark requirement.
Canonical three-rose-cluster artwork (roses + thorny vines + cloud) is not faithfully reproduced.

results.route_decision: Standard garment — FLUX Pro best value (98% quality, 26% cost)
issues: Front closure is a zipper; spec requires a full-length body-tone button or snap placket (explicit negative violation).
Hood has drawstrings, which are explicitly forbidden on this button-front bomber (hallucination).
Heart-and-thorns/rose graphic is rendered on the front chest, explicitly forbidden — that lockup belongs on the back only (hallucination).
Front wordmark is not in canonical red cursive embroidered script; 'Love'/'Hurts' placement and styling are incorrect across the placket.
Inner hood lining lacks the required white-with-red-rose-silhouette sublimated mini-pattern.

results.route_decision: Standard garment — FLUX Pro best value (98% quality, 26% cost)
issues: Front decoration is rendered as a rectangular patch/applique with a raised border — spec requires direct embroidery into the cuff face and explicitly forbids any exterior patch or tag.

Rose graphic does not match any canonical variant: only two roses instead of the three-rose cluster, and the white cloud wraps the roses as a background rather than sitting at the base of the thorny stems.
Logo scale appears too large/prominent for the ~1.5–2in cuff embroidery callout, and canonical details (thorny vines, blue accents in the cloud) are missing or incorrect.
Garment silhouette is mostly correct: black cuffed knit beanie with no brim or pom-pom.
Front decoration is wrong in material: it appears as a rectangular sewn patch/applique with a border, while the spec requires embroidery directly into the cuff and no exterior tag/patch.

results.route_decision: Text/logo product (kids-001) — GPT Image has 96%+ text accuracy
issues: Hallucinated large white rose/laurel graphic on the black upper chest panel — not in spec.
Hallucinated large circular text patch on the sweatpants — not in spec.
Pants are rust/orange instead of solid black.
Lower hoodie body and hood are rust/orange instead of saturated red.
Drawstrings on both hoodie and pants are black instead of the required white flat drawstrings.
